entries.title: Commentary on Proverbs on proverbs 16:14
entries.excerpt: The king's indignation is messengers of death. The messengers of death are the angels of Satan, that is, heretics and vain philosophers; indeed, all who announce those words to their neighbors, by which they are taken away to eternal death. The more they serve the author of death, the more they gravely offend the giver of life; yet the path of repentance is not closed to such. For it is added...

entries.title: Commentary on Proverbs on proverbs 16:14
entries.excerpt: And a wise man will appease him. For he can appease God by repenting, whom he happened to offend by speaking foolishly.
